StatDef.label: maximum speed
StatDef.description: The maximum speed of this aerocraft.

StatDef.label: minimum turn radius
StatDef.description: The minimum turn radius required for an aerocraft to complete a turn.

StatDef.label: Armor
StatDef.description:
The protection given against damage.

When taking damage, if the attacking weapon’s armor penetration value is greater than or equal to the armor rating, the full damage is applied. Otherwise, the damage is reduced by a percentage equal to the difference between the armor rating and the penetration value.

For example, with an attack that has 10% armor penetration, if the armor rating is 90%, the attack will only deal 20% of its original damage to the aircraft.
